sourcePattern: Tension/stress face hook plus overnight routine education.
headline: When your face feels tense by bedtime, keep the ritual calm.
primaryText: When your night routine feels tense or overcomplicated, make the last step simple. SATORI is a calm cream ritual built for hydration, smoother-looking texture, and consistency over time.
complianceNote: Avoid personal-attribute attack. Do not say the viewer looks stressed, old, or wrinkled.
productionAction: Film creator holding jar, relaxed vanity setup, texture close-up, and bedtime product shot.

sourcePattern: Real people/social proof ad with large proof claims.
headline: Real routine stories belong here once proof is verified.
primaryText: This is the SATORI proof format to use after real customer permission exists: routine length, original assets, lighting context, and a conservative cosmetic result statement.
complianceNote: Hold until verified customer assets, dates, permission, and disclaimer exist.
productionAction: Collect verified proof packet before writing final ad copy.

sourcePattern: Contrarian numbered-list hook that makes the product feel shareable.
headline: 3 reasons you may be glad you simplified your night routine.
subline: Less clutter. More consistency. One cream step.
primaryText: Three reasons the SATORI ritual makes sense: fewer steps at night, a richer hydration step, and a routine you can actually repeat.
complianceNote: Positive framing only. No shame, no guaranteed outcome.
productionAction: Cut 8-12s Reels with three quick product/application frames.

headline: No appointment. No downtime. Just a cream ritual at night.
primaryText: For nights when you want a non-invasive skincare ritual, SATORI keeps it simple: one cream step for hydration, texture support, and a smoother-looking finish over time.
complianceNote: Do not imply equivalent outcomes to injectables or medical procedures.
productionAction: Shoot macro texture, fingertip pickup, cheek/neck application, and product end frame.

sourcePattern: Future pacing around a tiny consistent nightly habit.
headline: A year from now, you may be glad you made tonight simple.
subline: Start with one repeatable cream step.
primaryText: The SATORI ritual is built around consistency: cleanse, apply, sleep, repeat. Start simple now and let the routine become easy to keep.
complianceNote: No future result guarantee. Keep it habit-focused.
productionAction: Film creator speaking to camera with calendar/checkmark cutaways.

sourcePattern: Comment keyword to trigger help/recommendation DM.
headline: Comment RITUAL when the help flow is ready.
subline: Send the starter path by DM.
primaryText: When the DM workflow is live, use this prompt to help shoppers choose between Cream, Duo, and Ritual Kit without mixing objectives inside the core conversion test.
complianceNote: Hold until DM automation, reply copy, and separate objective are tested.
productionAction: Build DM response path first, then film 8-12s prompt.

sourcePattern: OG/trend contrast against face taping and silicone patch chatter.
headline: Not another complicated trend. A cream ritual you can repeat.
subline: SATORI keeps the night step simple.
primaryText: Instead of chasing a new skincare trend every week, SATORI gives you one premium cream step to anchor your nightly routine.
complianceNote: Do not disparage competitors or claim superiority without proof.
productionAction: Film product hero plus simple founder/creator explainer.

sourcePattern: Busy/tired life moment with no time for a 10-step routine.
headline: Too tired for ten steps? Keep the last step simple.
primaryText: For the nights when a full routine is not happening, SATORI gives you a simple final cream step built around hydration and consistency.
complianceNote: Avoid targeting sensitive life states; keep it general and routine-focused.
productionAction: Shoot tired-night vanity sequence, product application, bedside close.

sourcePattern: Retail trust, clinical proof, reusable value stack.
headline: Use this trust format once SATORI has real proof points.
subline: Distribution, studies, press, or verified review data.
primaryText: This structure is reserved for future SATORI proof: retail availability, verified reviews, third-party testing, or operational trust claims. Do not publish until those facts exist.
complianceNote: Hold until factual proof exists. Do not invent clinical percentages, retailer availability, or press.
productionAction: Create only after proof registry has approved trust claims.

sourcePattern: Needle-free benefit stack with clear bullets.
headline: The needle-free cream step for a simpler night routine.
primaryText: SATORI is a needle-free nightly cream ritual for shoppers who want hydration, texture support, and a calmer-looking finish without adding another complicated step.
complianceNote: No clinical superiority claim and no procedure-equivalent promise.
productionAction: Use product-only static or short macro texture cut.

sourcePattern: Instant lift/plump hooks and dramatic benefit language.
headline: Do not use instant-lift language until claims are sourced.
primaryText: Competitors use fast-lift language aggressively. SATORI should only use this format after ingredient, testing, and claim substantiation are approved.
complianceNote: Hold. Avoid instant, clinical, lift, reversal, or percentage claims without proof.
productionAction: Rewrite as texture/hydration demo unless substantiation exists.

sourcePattern: Membership perks layered into ad copy.
headline: Golden Skin Club can become a retention ad once perks are real.
subline: Member pricing. Refill rhythm. Routine support.
primaryText: Use this structure once Golden Skin Club benefits are operational: member pricing, refill rhythm, early access, and routine support. Do not publish with invented perks.
complianceNote: Hold until membership economics and perks are live.
productionAction: Confirm Shopify membership/subscription terms before producing.
